A subdued colour palette meets captivating motifs inspired by nature and travel; this round mirror tray balances rich patterns against muted tones.
Overlapping shapes and colours create the tranquil rhythm of the Composed Angles collection; this screen-printed oblong glass tray layers translucent and opaque planes into an unexpected harmony.
With balanced proportions and an inviting form, the Aspekt lounge chair bridges past and present; its compact frame offers a generous, supportive seat with subtle details and clean lines.
The Barrow Pouf is a cosy complement to any living space; made with Italian fabrics in a range of hues, it creates a relaxed atmosphere while doubling as additional seating.
For Ethnicraft's Blackbird collection, designer Alain van Havre brings together opposing elements, combining soft round legs and eye-catching graphic lines into light and airy designs.

products.description: A rhythmic play of form and function, the Block rack brings sculptural impact to everyday storage; crafted from solid mahogany, its angular dividers offer dynamic views from every angle.

Reminiscent of a goat's curved horns, the Bok collection combines sculptural elegance and contemporary crafting into a graceful, airy form; the Bok coffee table provides a refined foundation for any living space.
The Bok side table was designed to attract attention without diverting it from the items you choose to display on it; from art to books or plants, your object of choice has found its stage.

Reminiscent of a goat's curved horns, the Bok collection combines sculptural elegance and contemporary crafting into a graceful, airy form; over the years the Bok dining chair has become one of Ethnicraft's most recognizable designs.
Playful, pebble shapes set on a beautiful folded base; the Boomerang coffee table is a well-proportioned addition to any space, configured together or as a stand-alone.

The DC dining chair features an airy, angular metal silhouette that forms the basis of a minimalist design, balancing solidity and softness; made with a powder-coated steel frame and semi-aniline leather.
Seeking inspiration from the 50s, the Barrow lounge chair has an irresistible vintage vibe; the lightness of the metal foot base teamed with premium upholstery is a timeless addition to any space.
The Eye dining chairs combine classic European furniture design with solid oak construction to create a timeless piece; the curved backrest, reminiscent of a winked eye, inspired the name.
With sleek angular front legs and flowing smooth connections, the Eye lounge chair is a hallmark solid wooden seating design; the curved backrest, reminiscent of a winked eye, inspired the name.
The Facette chair's ingenious wooden structure is divided into facets, creating the impression of folded paper from solid wood, grounded by powder-coated metal legs; designed by Alain van Havre.
Part of the Geometric collection where shapes intersect in unexpected ways; inspired by the bestselling side table, the round geometric dining table makes a practical statement.
Alluring from every angle, the Jack lounge chair's clean lines are inspired by Scandinavian modernism, reinforcing a classic, vintage feel; upholstered in sumptuous fabric for utmost comfort.

Whether serving fruit or holding keys, the hand-carved Japan board elevates your home while remaining practical at heart; each board is slightly different, bringing the essence of craftsmanship into your home.

By exchanging the rectangular tabletop for an ellipse, the Mikado oval dining table increases togetherness and connection, making it easier to converse with everyone; it seats over a dozen comfortably.

Inspired by remaining offcuts from Ethnicraft's factory, the layered wood pieces of the Mosaic sideboard form a rhythm reminiscent of a pipe organ's partition; a renewed translation of Alain van Havre's obsession for movement.
The N701 90-degree square corner module features a square edge, perfect for combining your N701 pieces into a custom configuration; designed by Jacques Deneef.
The N701 round leather corner unit provides a comfortable corner with a smooth round edge compared to the standard square edge, helping create a cohesive N701 sofa design.
The N701 round leather corner unit provides a comfortable corner with a smooth round edge compared to the standard square edge, helping create a cohesive N701 sofa design.

products.model: N701 Modular Sofa with Square Corner, No. 4
products.description: A pre-configured N701 modular sofa set combining seater modules with a 90-degree square corner; designed by Jacques Deneef with unlimited configuration possibilities.
Ethnicraft's Nordic collection combines refined design with the purity of solid wood; beveled edges give it an extra edge, and the oak Nordic coffee table features one storage drawer.
Inspired by Ethnicraft's Nordic range, Nordic II is a bedroom collection that combines elegant lines with the purity of solid wood; built to last with top-quality material and timeless design.
Experience the timeless elegance of the Nordic sideboard; crafted from solid oak with beveled edges, this piece embodies Scandinavian design with clean lines and natural beauty.
Experience the timeless elegance of the Nordic sideboard; crafted from solid oak with beveled edges, this piece embodies Scandinavian design with clean lines and natural beauty.
Part of Ethnicraft's Urban Geometry collection inspired by Art Deco architecture, featuring bursts of paprika, pumpkin and saffron with a dash of steel blue.
Organic movement meets linear shapes in the Linear Flow tray collection; when the pigment hits the glass it takes on a remarkable life of its own.
Part of the Ethnicraft Osso collection designed by Grain & Green, the Osso dining table showcases rounded curved edges and enhanced form without compromising functionality.

The PI collection honours nature's design by keeping the strength, curves and lines; each PI piece is finished by hand to ensure the individual character of the wood is respected. Designed by Alain van Havre.
Honoring nature with soft curves and grooved joinery, the PI coffee table brings warmth and interest to a functional living-room piece in solid European white oak with a clear matte varnish.
The PI collection honours nature's design by keeping the strength, curves and lines; each PI side table is finished by hand to ensure that the individual character of the wood is respected.
The PI collection honours nature's design by keeping the strength, curves, and lines; each PI shelf is finished by hand to ensure the individual character of the wood is respected.
Each PI book end is finished by hand to ensure the individual character of the wood is respected; interesting shapes are discovered in this sleek, polished imperfect finish.
The PI coat stand stylishly stores coats, hats and other personal effects; each PI item is finished by hand to ensure the individual character of the wood is respected.
The PI dining chair boasts a truly impressive design; each PI piece is meticulously crafted by hand to honor the unique character of the wood.

products.model: Roller Max Round Storage Coffee Table
products.description: Designed by Jacques Deneef, the Roller Max combines a coffee table with storage; the tabletop can be easily removed to hide newspapers, toys, cushions and throws.
The Roller Max collection is remarkable in its design, distinguished by its stacked wood-stick effect; both comfortable and compact, this eye-catching stool is versatile.
Both functional and decorative, this bowl will delicately accessorise your dining table and living space; each piece is created by Javanese carvers and turners.
A round valet tray inspired by the organic shapes and abstract shadows of nature; layers hand-printed glass over the warmth of wood.
A subdued colour palette meets captivating motifs inspired by nature and travel; this organic glass valet tray balances rich patterns against muted tones.

Sono cupboard features 4 doors and internal adjustable shelves, merging traditional artistry with contemporary sophistication; its design showcases intricately carved panels and elegant brass handles.
Inspired by the traditional spinning wheel, the Spindle bench incorporates perfectly aligned spokes into the seat back. Designed by Nathan Yong.
With one drawer, open space and slightly tapered legs, the Spindle bedside table is the perfect companion for the Spindle bed; a glass top and single shelf add storage and lightness.
A square glass tray with a hand-painted base and silk-screen printed glass over a wooden rim, part of Ethnicraft's tray collection inspired by organic shapes and abstract shadows of nature.
By aligning multiple angles, Alain van Havre created a unique sense of volume in the Oak Stairs Column; light casts shadows across the multifaceted solid oak geometry for added depth.
The Swivel tray side table is one of our most versatile pieces; its ability to adopt different trays lets you mix or match colours and patterns into a personal piece.
Both functional and decorative, these boards will delicately accessorise your dining and kitchen space; each piece is fully hand carved.
The round tray table is one of our most versatile pieces; while it serves as a coffee/side table, its ability to adopt different trays lets you mix or match colours and patterns.
The Twist collection of side tables features a triangular base and legs with a dynamic curve, inspired by the graceful arcs of a tree branch; solid oak with a hardwax oil finish.
Defined by its blend of materials, fluid lines and crafted piping trace the contours of the upholstered shell; designed by Studio Segers, down to the uniquely shaped legs.
A valet tray inspired by the organic shapes and abstract shadows of nature; layers hand-printed glass over the warmth of wood.
Wabi Sabi - beauty in the imperfect - lives in the muted palette and irregular forms of the Wabi Sabi tray; each is hand-painted and one of a kind, recreating the hues of a mountainous landscape.
This elegant wall shelf, crafted from European oak, is the perfect solution for extra shelving; clean lines let them be aligned or stacked in your preferred combinations.

The Whitebird collection combines simple shapes with clean lines; the light frame offers a Scandinavian lightness, with white-oil finished doors and drawers wrapped in oak. Designed by Alain van Havre.
The Whitebird sideboard with 3 doors features eye-catching graphic lines in a light, minimal design, offering adjustable shelves for versatile storage. Designed by Alain van Havre.
The Whitebird collection combines simple shapes with clean lines; this tall cupboard offers one door with adjustable shelving and a soft-close drawer. Designed by Alain van Havre.

The Bok collection combines sculptural elegance and contemporary crafting into a graceful, airy form; the Bok bench pairs perfectly with the Bok dining table or works as a stand-alone against a wall, in a hallway, or at the end of a bed.
Just like its matching chair, the Bok dining table has become one of Ethnicraft's signature designs; its airy shape yet rock-solid construction make it a timeless and remarkable piece.

With enriched shapes and unexpected details, the Geometric solid oak dining table is a statement piece, equally at home in the dining room or workspace; softened edges and natural lines offset its generous length.
The Mikado dining table, designed by Alain van Havre, has been one of Ethnicraft's most recognizable designs for years; its sculptural character comes from legs that interlock like a puzzle.
Ethnicraft's Osso stool combines timeless classic design with sturdiness; Osso stools come in low and high versions and are designed to go with the Osso table, but also work by themselves.
The PI dining table offers a balanced place to gather and share memories; each PI item is finished by hand to ensure the individual character of the wood is respected. Designed by Alain van Havre.
The PI sideboard is striking and unique, with practical storage to complement a space; each PI item is finished by hand to ensure the individual character of the wood is respected.
A slice of nature to grace your home, this clever design complements both modern and traditional styles; the Slice's organic form is finished by hand in our unique, hard-wearing Minerals finish.

Inspired by the traditional spinning wheel, the Spindle bed incorporates perfectly aligned spokes into the headboard; slightly tapered legs and rounded edges add a soft, sensual quality. Designed by Nathan Yong.
A solid round pedestal table with subtle complexities, the Torsion dining table uses advanced woodworking to create a light tabletop on a stable, sculptural base. Designed by Alain van Havre.
